intervention_reason: Unity editor/runtime and licensed CI execution are still required to validate Stage 2 behavior end-to-end.
notes: Implemented Stage 2 scaffolding in code: AlienFactory-based subtype spawning, Stalker/TechUnit/Overlord placeholder alien classes, WaveConfig support for pre/post wave delays and entry selection modes (Fixed/RoundRobin/Random), WaveSpawner event and flow upgrades, runtime mixed-wave data expansion, and editor asset generation updates for additional alien and wave ScriptableObjects. Expanded PlayMode tests to cover subtype spawning and round-robin entry behavior. Added stage2 status and deferred verification logs in docs/stage2_wave_system_status.md and docs/stage2_wave_system_deferred_log.json.
